actions.value:
If you are struggling to get the ARRR wallet to sync effectively on mobile, and have already tried our first troubleshooting steps, you may export your ARRR wallet's Master Private Key and carefully bring it into a more powerful desktop environment.

 

We recommend using either:

  • https://pirate.black/wallets/desktop-lite   or 
  • https://pirate.black/wallets/treasure-chest

WARNING: Exposing your private key can be risky if you do not take the right precautions to keep it secure.

 

Please review this article to learn about specifying a Birthday Height when importing a privacy coin wallet - 

What is a Wallet Birthday Height?
